design_status.note: Checkpoint status is tracked per-subsystem in the subsystems array via spec_status. There is no global waiting flag — check each subsystem entry.

subsystem_schema.note: This documents the structure of each object in the subsystems array. Not a real subsystem entry.
subsystem_schema.name: string — human readable
subsystem_schema.spec_version: string — current released version e.g. 1.0 or empty if not yet released
subsystem_schema.spec_path: string — file path to spec document or empty string
subsystem_schema.spec_status: string — enum: not_started | reflection_pending | signoff_pending | in_design | released | under_correction
subsystem_schema.reflection_id: string — DRF message_id sent for this subsystem or empty string
subsystem_schema.signoff_id: string — RSO message_id received or empty string
subsystem_schema.release_id: string — SPR message_id sent or empty string
subsystem_schema.open_correction_requests: array of SRR message_ids pending response
subsystem_schema.open_disputes: array of IDP message_ids pending resolution
